title: CommandCenterUI outcome + cost/yield rows in MAP runtime card
description: TASK-182 follow-on (operator-approved CommandCenterUI output boundary precedent): extend /api/map/health with cost_yield and outcomes sources (read-only, mirrors TASK-182's cache/lock/error-isolation pattern) and two compact rows in the existing MAP runtime card, consuming TASK-189 outcome metrics and TASK-190 cost_yield.py. Packet: MAP_System/inbox/helpers/ui-metrics-cards-packet.md. Baseline-committed the operator's uncommitted sidebar/timer work first (CommandCenterUI commit 1f8b245), per the packet's explicit instruction, before this change's own commit.
acceptance_criteria: map_health() gains cost_yield and outcomes sources behind the same TTL cache/lock/error-isolation plumbing as the other five sources (TASK-182 pattern).

cost_yield row surfaces productive/pending(+task count)/abandoned percents from cost_yield.py --json; outcomes row surfaces outcome_event_count + blind-spot rate from map_metrics.py --json, showing 'no outcomes recorded yet' instead of an error when zero events.
MAP runtime card gains exactly two rows without a new sidebar section, respecting the operator's restructured layout.
Live verification: server up, curl cold+warm on /api/map/health, Playwright DOM check for the two new rows, evidence recorded in a MAP-side artifact.
Operator's uncommitted CommandCenterUI work baseline-committed first as its own commit before this change's commit, mirroring TASK-182's bb847f6 precedent.
